name: Haunted Desires
overview: The story of a man trapped in an emotional and physical tug-of-war. Though he's been with his loyal and loving partner for years, the memories of his ex - who ignited a passion like no other - continue to haunt him. As her struggles with lingering desires and the comfort of his current relationship, he must decide whether to embrace the love he has or chase the fire he lost. Will he learn to let go, or will temptation pull him back into the arms of his past?

trailers.title: HAUNTED DESIRES: A NEW PINOY BL SERIES#comingsoon #pinoyBLSERIES
